what_it_does: Records a raised signal that the operator has decided the card-refine-posture decision with the chosen option 'Let it propose refinements — you accept each', and that work gated on that decision may resume.
observations: Created and updated timestamps are identical
History contains a single state transition from null to raised by operator with note 'filed'
standouts: It is a decision-decided signal that explicitly gates downstream work resuming
The chosen option is phrased as a human-AI interaction pattern: propose refinements, operator accepts each
notes: A noticeboard signal recording the resolution of a global decision and authorizing gated work to resume.
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose matches content: it records a decision resolution and signals that gated work can resume.
intention_signals: To make a decision outcome visible to the system so that dependent lanes or steps can proceed with the selected refinement posture.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, linkable decision-resolution event that downstream processes can observe to unblock work.
summary_for_embedding: A raised noticeboard signal recording the operator's decision on card-refine-posture and stating that gated work may resume.
intention_for_embedding: To communicate a decision outcome and trigger resumption of work gated on that decision.
